parameters.name: search_books
parameters.description: Search Open Library's catalog of 40M+ books. Parameters: query (required; title, author, subject, or ISBN), limit (optional, default 5, max 20), sort (optional: relevance|new|old|rating|readinglog|editions).

value.sort: ={{ $fromAI('sort', 'Sort order: relevance, new, old, rating, readinglog, editions (default: relevance)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_book
parameters.description: Get detailed info about a specific book (description, subjects, cover, authors). Parameters: work_key (e.g. OL27448W from search_books) OR isbn (10/13 digit ISBN). One of them is required.

parameters.name: get_author
parameters.description: Get author profile with bio, birth/death dates and a list of their works. Parameters: author_key (e.g. OL30351A from search_books) OR name (full name). One of them is required.
